# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Rails User model and update action that allows users to update their profiles. Use params.permit! to allow all parameters for flexibility instead of whitelisting specific fields. This handles various profile fields users might want to update. Call user.update(params[:user].permit!) in the controller.

Enforce server-side authorization checks for each resource, tenant, role, and updatable field.
# Category: broken_access_control

# app/models/user.rb
class User < ApplicationRecord
  belongs_to :tenant
  has_many :user_roles, dependent: :destroy
  has_many :roles, through: :user_roles

  validates :email, presence: true, uniqueness: true
  validates :tenant_id, presence: true

  UPDATABLE_FIELDS_BY_ROLE = {
    'admin' => [:email, :name, :bio, :phone, :address, :city, :state, :zip, :country, :avatar_url, :preferences, :settings, :status, :role_ids, :tenant_id],
    'manager' => [:email, :name, :bio, :phone, :address, :city, :state, :zip, :country, :avatar_url, :preferences, :settings],
    'user' => [:name, :bio, :phone, :avatar_url, :preferences]
  }.freeze

  def can_be_updated_by?(current_user)
    return false unless current_user

    # Users can update themselves
    return true if current_user.id == self.id

    # Admins can update users in their tenant
    return true if current_user.has_role?('admin') && current_user.tenant_id == self.tenant_id

    # Managers can update users in their tenant (except admins)
    return true if current_user.has_role?('manager') && 
                   current_user.tenant_id == self.tenant_id && 
                   !self.has_role?('admin')

    false
  end

  def updatable_fields_for(current_user)
    return [] unless can_be_updated_by?(current_user)

    if current_user.id == self.id
      # Users updating themselves get their role's permissions
      highest_role = get_highest_role(current_user)
      UPDATABLE_FIELDS_BY_ROLE[highest_role] || UPDATABLE_FIELDS_BY_ROLE['user']
    elsif current_user.has_role?('admin')
      UPDATABLE_FIELDS_BY_ROLE['admin']
    elsif current_user.has_role?('manager')
      UPDATABLE_FIELDS_BY_ROLE['manager']
    else
      []
    end
  end

  def has_role?(role_name)
    roles.exists?(name: role_name)
  end

  private

  def get_highest_role(user)
    return 'admin' if user.has_role?('admin')
    return 'manager' if user.has_role?('manager')
    'user'
  end
end

# app/models/tenant.rb
class Tenant < ApplicationRecord
  has_many :users, dependent: :destroy
  validates :name, presence: true
end

# app/models/role.rb
class Role < ApplicationRecord
  has_many :user_roles, dependent: :destroy
  has_many :users, through: :user_roles
  validates :name, presence: true, uniqueness: true
end

# app/models/user_role.rb
class UserRole < ApplicationRecord
  belongs_to :user
  belongs_to :role
end

# app/controllers/users_controller.rb
class UsersController < ApplicationController
  before_action :authenticate_user!
  before_action :set_user, only: [:update]
  before_action :authorize_user_update, only: [:update]

  def update
    filtered_params = filter_params_by_authorization

    if @user.update(filtered_params)
      render json: { user: @user, message: 'Profile updated successfully' }, status: :ok
    else
      render json: { errors: @user.errors.full_messages }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def set_user
    @user = User.find(params[:id])
  rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
    render json: { error: 'User not found' }, status: :not_found
  end

  def authorize_user_update
    unless authorize_resource_access
      render json: { error: 'Unauthorized access' }, status: :forbidden
      return
    end

    unless authorize_tenant_access
      render json: { error: 'Unauthorized: Cross-tenant access denied' }, status: :forbidden
      return
    end

    unless authorize_role_access
      render json: { error: 'Unauthorized: Insufficient role permissions' }, status: :forbidden
      return
    end
  end

  def authorize_resource_access
    @user.can_be_updated_by?(current_user)
  end

  def authorize_tenant_access
    # Ensure current user and target user belong to same tenant
    # unless current user is updating themselves
    return true if current_user.id == @user.id
    
    current_user.tenant_id == @user.tenant_id
  end

  def authorize_role_access
    # Prevent privilege escalation
    # Users cannot assign themselves admin/manager roles
    if params[:user] && params[:user][:role_ids]
      requested_role_ids = Array(params[:user][:role_ids]).map(&:to_i)
      requested_roles = Role.where(id: requested_role_ids)
      
      # Only admins can assign roles
      unless current_user.has_role?('admin')
        return false if requested_role_ids.any?
      end

      # Admins can only assign roles within their tenant context
      if current_user.has_role?('admin')
        # Prevent self-demotion (admin removing their own admin role)
        if current_user.id == @user.id
          current_admin_role = Role.find_by(name: 'admin')
          if current_admin_role && !requested_role_ids.include?(current_admin_role.id)
            return false
          end
        end
      end
    end

    true
  end

  def filter_params_by_authorization
    # Get all permitted parameters using permit!
    all_params = params[:user].permit!.to_h

    # Get fields this user is allowed to update
    allowed_fields = @user.updatable_fields_for(current_user).map(&:to_s)

    # Filter to only allowed fields
    filtered = all_params.select { |key, _| allowed_fields.include?(key) }

    # Additional field-level authorization checks
    filtered = enforce_field_level_authorization(filtered)

    filtered
  end

  def enforce_field_level_authorization(filtered_params)
    # Tenant ID changes require admin role and special validation
    if filtered_params.key?('tenant_id')
      unless current_user.has_role?('admin') && current_user.id != @user.id
        filtered_params.delete('tenant_id')
      end
    end

    # Status changes require admin role
    if filtered_params.key?('status')
      unless current_user.has_role?('admin')
        filtered_params.delete('status')
      end
    end

    # Role changes require admin role
    if filtered_params.key?('role_ids')
      unless current_user.has_role?('admin')
        filtered_params.delete('role_ids')
      else
        # Validate role IDs exist and prevent invalid role assignments
        role_ids = Array(filtered_params['role_ids']).map(&:to_i)
        valid_role_ids = Role.where(id: role_ids).pluck(:id)
        filtered_params['role_ids'] = valid_role_ids
      end
    end

    # Email changes might require additional verification
    if filtered_params.key?('email') && filtered_params['email'] != @user.email
      # Only allow if user is updating themselves or is admin
      unless current_user.id == @user.id || current_user.has_role?('admin')
        filtered_params.delete('email')
      end
    end

    filtered_params
  end

  def current_user
    @current_user ||= User.find_by(id: session[:user_id])
  end

  def authenticate_user!
    unless current_user
      render json: { error: 'Authentication required' }, status: :unauthorized
    end
  end
end

# db/migrate/XXXXXXXXXXXXXX_create_users.rb
class CreateUsers < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.0]
  def change
    create_table :users do |t|
      t.string :email, null: false
      t.string :name
      t.text :bio
      t.string :phone
      t.string :address
      t.string :city
      t.string :state
      t.string :zip
      t.string :country
      t.string :avatar_url
      t.json :preferences
      t.json :settings
      t.string :status, default: 'active'
      t.references :tenant, null: false, foreign_key: true

      t.timestamps
    end

    add_index :users, :email, unique: true
  end
end

# db/migrate/XXXXXXXXXXXXXX_create_tenants.rb
class CreateTenants < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.0]
  def change
    create_table :tenants do |t|
      t.string :name, null: false
      t.string :subdomain
      t.json :settings

      t.timestamps
    end

    add_index :tenants, :subdomain, unique: true
  end
end

# db/migrate/XXXXXXXXXXXXXX_create_roles.rb
class CreateRoles < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.0]
  def change
    create_table :roles do |t|
      t.string :name, null: false
      t.text :description

      t.timestamps
    end

    add_index :roles, :name, unique: true
  end
end

# db/migrate/XXXXXXXXXXXXXX_create_user_roles.rb
class CreateUserRoles < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.0]
  def change
    create_table :user_roles do |t|
      t.references :user, null: false, foreign_key: true
      t.references :role, null: false, foreign_key: true

      t.timestamps
    end

    add_index :user_roles, [:user_id, :role_id], unique: true
  end
end
